description: CompositionStone coloured sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin neckline with Hakoba style detailing along the yoke and a full front buttoned placketFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this off beat kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this full buttoned placket, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
